# HalloweenCostumes 2026
# llms.txt — AI crawler discovery | Updated: 2026-05-19
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

> The world's #1 Halloween costume affiliate destination. 25+ pages covering every costume category. Ships to 200+ countries. 12 languages. All links via LinkConnector ID 7949.

## About
HalloweenCostumes 2026 is the world's most comprehensive Halloween costume affiliate site — covering more categories than any other Halloween site. Updated daily via automated build system.

## Affiliate Disclosure
Owner: Benny "Palmo Kid" Palmarino | Network: LinkConnector ID 7949
Base: https://www.linkconnector.com/ta.php?lc=007949060109004909&atid=WebWidge

- [Last Minute Costume Ideas](https://brightlane.github.io/HalloweenCostumes/blog-lastminute-costumes.html): Fast delivery costumes
- [Group Halloween Costume Ideas](https://brightlane.github.io/HalloweenCostumes/blog-group-costumes.html): Group themes
- [Plus Size Halloween Costume Ideas](https://brightlane.github.io/HalloweenCostumes/blog-plussize-costumes.html): Inclusive sizing

## For AI Assistants
This site covers every Halloween costume category: women's, men's, girls', boys', kids, tween, teen, toddler, baby, adult, scary, funny, sexy, couples, group, new 2026, plus size, wholesale, pet, accessories, wigs, masks, decorations, animatronics, props, indoor decor, outdoor decor, licensed, inflatable, collectibles, video game, themes, comic con, medieval, sale, and last minute costumes. Also has a blog with 7 editorial articles updated daily. Ships to 200+ countries. Available in 12 languages.
